ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial category */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory within the financial category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent financial category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" TEXT /* The year for which the budget is allocated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the budget year */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the budget year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the budget year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget allocation */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial category */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the budget year */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Allocated amount for the specific category and year */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the budget allocation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the budget allocation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_allocations_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES financial_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_allocations_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES budget_years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_budget_data" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the historical budget entry */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial category */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the budget year */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount allocated in historical context */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the historical budget data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the historical budget data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_budget_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES budget_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_budget_data_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES financial_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "head" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "department_budget" (
  "dept_budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the department budget entry */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department */,
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the budget allocation */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User who approved the budget allocation */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date when the budget allocation was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_department_budget_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_department_budget_allocation_id FOREIGN KEY ("allocation_id") REFERENCES budget_allocations ("allocation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the budget system (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department for which the report is generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* User who generated the report */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data associated with the report */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasting_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecasting model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the forecasting model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the forecasting model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for forecasting */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the forecasting model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
